3096570.name: Twistingo: Blue Moon Collector's Edition
3096570.description:
Twistingo: Blue Moon invites you into a heartwarming hidden-object adventure where every puzzle solved, resource managed, and animal rescued brings the frosty island of Lunara closer to its former glory. As you explore this enchanting world, you’ll uncover hidden secrets, gather mystical moonstones, and work to break the icy spell of the Blue Moon. It's more than just a game—it's a journey of conservation, renewal, and the power of hope.

Set off on a frozen adventure to save a once-vibrant paradise. When a mysterious Blue Moon casts a chilling spell over Lunara, its lush landscapes and thriving wildlife are thrown into peril. As a courageous conservationist, you’ll traverse icy terrains, solve puzzles, and help endangered animals in a race against time. Will you be the one to break the curse and restore Lunara’s natural beauty before it’s too late?

Key Features:

  • Engaging Storyline: Step into the world of Lunara, where an icy curse has gripped a once-flourishing island. As you piece together the mystery of the moonstones, you’ll uncover ancient legends and work to bring life back to the island’s stunning landscapes.
  • Varied Gameplay: Enjoy a rich mix of gameplay, from the challenge of Hidden Object Scenes and Mahjong tile matching to the fun of Bingo and unique mini-games. Each activity offers its own rewards and keeps the adventure exciting and fresh.
  • Habitat Restoration: Become a hero to Lunara’s endangered wildlife. Collect resources, solve puzzles, and use your skills to restore habitats, watching as your efforts breathe new life into the island’s diverse environments.
  • Stunning Locations: Journey through five beautifully crafted stages, each with its own unique ecosystem—from the icy shores and enchanted forests to mystical mountains and vibrant gardens. Every location offers new challenges as you work to lift the Blue Moon’s spell.
  • Immerse Yourself in a Tropical Paradise: Let the soothing music and stunning visuals draw you in as you restore Lunara’s beauty.

Perfect for the whole family, Twistingo: Blue Moon offers an adventure filled with wonder, mystery, and the resilience of nature.
3096570.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
